an1.219:1.1: "Foremost, *bhikkhus*, among my *bhikkhu* disciples who are learned is Ānanda.
an1.221:1.1: … Among those with attainment is Ānanda.
an1.222:1.1: … Among those with steadfastness is Ānanda.
an1.223:1.1: … Among those who wait upon others is Ānanda.
an1.224:1.1: … Among those with a great following is Uruvelakassapa.
an1.225:1.1: … Among those who inspire confidence in families is Kāḷudāyī.
an1.226:1.1: … Among those with few ailments is Bākula.
an1.227:1.1: … Among those who recollect past lives is Sobhita.
an1.228:1.1: … Among those who uphold the *Vinaya* is Upāli.
an1.229:1.1: … Among those who advise *bhikkhunis* is Nandaka.
an1.230:1.1: … Among those who guard the gates of the *indriyas* is Nanda.
an1.231:1.1: … Among those who advise *bhikkhus* is Mahākappina.
an1.232:1.1: … Among those skilled in the fire element is Sāgata.
an1.233:1.1: … Among those who speak with ready wit is Rādha.
an1.234:1.1: … Among those who wear coarse robes is Mogharāja."
